---
title: "Generate day/night transition mapping"
---

```{r}

library(suntools)

# Calculate sunset - takes coords, datetime, crs, direction (sunrise/sunset), and whether to return POSIXct

location <- matrix(
    data = c(-33.8623, 151.2077),
    nrow = 1)

suntools::sunriset(
  matrix(c(-76.4511, 42.4800), nrow = 1),
  as.POSIXct("2023-06-01", tz = "America/New_York"),
  crs = sf::st_crs(4326),
  direction='sunset',
  POSIXct.out=TRUE
)

#  day_frac                time
#1 0.858628 2023-06-01 20:36:25


```
